title: Implement Hero Section in Next.js Landing Page
description: Develop the enhanced hero section on the landing page using React and Tailwind CSS, following the approved design.
details: Update the main landing page component (e.g., pages/index.js or components/HeroSection.js) to include the new hero section structure. Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Integrate the CTA button to route users to the signup or authentication flow. Use optimized images or SVGs for illustrations. Ensure accessibility (WCAG AA) for all elements.
test_strategy: Manually test the landing page in Chrome, Firefox, and Safari. Use browser dev tools to check responsiveness. Use accessibility tools (axe, Lighthouse) to verify color contrast, keyboard navigation, and ARIA labels.

title: Add Animation or Micro-Interaction to Hero CTA
description: Enhance the hero section's CTA button with a subtle animation or micro-interaction to increase user engagement.
details: Implement a hover/focus animation on the CTA button using Tailwind CSS transitions or a lightweight React animation library. The animation should be smooth, accessible, and not distract from the main content. Optionally, add a small entrance animation for the hero section elements when the page loads.
test_strategy: Test the animation on all supported browsers. Confirm that the animation triggers on hover/focus, is accessible (does not cause motion sickness), and does not interfere with page performance or usability.

title: Write Unit and Integration Tests for Hero Section
description: Ensure the new hero section is robust by adding unit and integration tests for its components and interactions.
details: Use Jest and React Testing Library to write tests for the hero section component. Test for correct rendering of headline, subheadline, CTA, and image. Simulate user interaction with the CTA button and verify navigation. Check responsiveness using snapshot tests or utility functions.
test_strategy: Run all tests locally and in CI. Ensure 100% coverage for the hero section component. Validate that tests pass on all supported Node.js versions.

title: Design Enhanced Hero Section Layout
description: Create a visually appealing and informative hero section for the landing page that aligns with the Social Stats Dashboard brand and value proposition.
details: Design a new hero section using Tailwind CSS and React components. The section should include a clear headline, subheadline, a call-to-action (CTA) button (e.g., 'Get Started'), and a relevant illustration or image. Ensure the design communicates the dashboard's core benefits (unified social analytics, fast setup, easy insights). The layout must be responsive for both desktop and tablet breakpoints.
test_strategy: Review the hero section visually on desktop and tablet. Verify that all elements (headline, subheadline, CTA, image) are present, well-aligned, and readable. Confirm that the section adapts responsively to different screen sizes.
